$comment: D-CSUBSET-LABEL-BEFORE-CASE: a label before a case (`hop: case 0:`) parses as labelStmt(hop, caseStmt(case 0, body)); the label stays a real LabelStmt at the arm entry so `goto hop` resolves INTO the switch (pre-scan + goto-resolution work unchanged). sel=feed(1) keeps the switch live on baseline. switch(1)->case 1: acc+=20, sel=0, goto hop; hop:->case 0: acc+=5; goto out -> return 25. Robust under release: case-0 stays reachable via goto hop even if the switch is folded. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop `caseStmt` from the statement alt -> error[P0001]. Witnessed baseline AND release, x86 PE+ELF + arm64 qemu + macho.
